title: EQ - Bass, Flat, Bright screens
scenario: EQ presets (Bass, Flat, Bright) can be selected and applied with locked sliders and UI matching Figma design in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, tap the connected device name to open Device Settings.
3. In Device Settings, tap Audio Settings.
5. On the Equalizer screen, tap the "Bass" preset.
6. Observe the slider positions and the preset description displayed on screen.
7. Attempt to drag any of the EQ sliders.
9. Observe the slider positions and the preset description displayed on screen.
10. Attempt to drag any of the EQ sliders.
12. Observe the slider positions and the preset description displayed on screen.
13. Attempt to drag any of the EQ sliders.
expected: Each preset (Bass, Flat, Bright) is selectable. When selected, the EQ sliders move to the correct positions and the description matches the Figma design. All sliders are locked (not user-adjustable) when a preset is active.
